summary: Backfill missing memory log entries for October autonomy work and ship a guard that blocks new drift.

steps.title: Audit memory gaps since 2025-10-03
steps.notes: Ran tools.memory.gap_audit to enumerate 106 plans created since 2025-10-03; autonomy work (e.g., 2025-10-19-* plans) lack memory coverage.

steps.title: Capture autonomy coordinator/evolution reflections
steps.notes: Appended memory/log.jsonl entries (lines 134–135) referencing the Oct 19 autonomy coordinator/evolution receipts, captured the targeted gap audit as proof, and logged a reflection describing the remediation.

steps.title: Automate memory guard for multi-LLM sessions
steps.notes: Added scripts/ci/check_memory_gap.py (default 72h window) invoking tools.memory.gap_audit with fail semantics, documented the guard, and covered it with tests.

checkpoint.description: Memory log reflects all Oct 19 autonomy artifacts and guard prevents future drift
